text.title: Burndown Diagnosis Cheatsheet Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Burndown is ≥20% above ideal at mid-sprint AND ≥3 days remaining?

branch.question: Sprint has named goal AND tracked scope + blockers?
